# Python dependencies for TreeSHAP test case generation
# Pin exact versions for reproducible test results
#
# NOTE: On macOS, you may need to install llvmlite via conda/homebrew first,
# or use the pre-built wheels in CI. See README.md for details.

numpy==1.26.4
scikit-learn==1.4.2
shap==0.44.1

# SHAP's dependencies (numba requires llvmlite)
numba>=0.50.0
